author: Aaron Beavers
name: Local RTX 4070 SP1024 7x512 KV4 500-step run
blurb: Non-record local consumer-GPU track: SP-1024 7x512 with KV4 on 1x RTX 4070 Laptop GPU; trained for 500 steps on one published train shard and evaluated on the full published validation split; final int8+zlib roundtrip scored 1.65718316 under the 16,000,000-byte cap.
